prompt: Build a chart comparing 'Will the Iranian regime fall by May 31?', 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?', 'Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?', and 'US obtains Iranian enriched uranium by May 31?' by implied probability, 24h volume, open interest, and recent whale flow.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
Based on data from a past query (as of May 2, 2026), here is a comparison of the requested Iran-related Polymarket prediction markets. 

The accompanying chart highlights that "Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?" currently leads in both implied probability (29.5%) and net whale inflow (~$133.9k). Conversely, the "Iranian regime fall" market shows a sharp divergence where retail is selling, but whales are net buyers of "Yes" positions.

**Note:** Open Interest data was unavailable for these specific markets at the time of retrieval.

| Market | Implied Probability | 24h Volume | Whale Net Flow (24h) | Whale Sentiment |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?** | 29.5% | $19,601,970.92 | +$133,860.01 | Bullish |
| **US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?** | 22.5% | $10,082,228.88 | -$7,356.03 | Bearish |
| **US obtains Iranian enriched uranium by May 31?** | 8.5% | $7,804,928.12 | +$69,806.96 | Bullish |
| **Will the Iranian regime fall by May 31?** | 2.4% | $12,639,051.65 | +$45,091.32 | Bullish |
